title: Check Animal Health
description: Choose an animal that is healthy, active, and free from visible diseases or injuries.

title: Verify Age Requirements
description: Ensure the animal meets the minimum age requirements according to Islamic guidelines.

title: Inspect Weight and Build
description: A well-built animal with a healthy weight is generally a better choice for Qurbani.

title: Buy from Trusted Sellers
description: Purchase animals from verified farms or trusted sellers to ensure quality and authenticity.

title: Check Feeding Practices
description: Animals raised on natural and nutritious feed are often healthier and better suited for Qurbani.

title: Arrange Safe Transportation
description: Transport animals carefully to minimize stress and maintain their health.
